ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the item */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the item (e.g., Consumable) */,
  "subclass" TEXT /* Subclass of the item (e.g., Explosives and Devices) */,
  "quality" TEXT /* Quality of the item */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the item */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the item's icon */,
  "is_stackable" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the item can be stacked */,
  "max_stack_size" INTEGER /* Maximum stack size for the item */,
  "is_tradable" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the item can be traded */,
  "is_craftable" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the item can be crafted */,
  "crafting_requirements" TEXT /* JSON field to store crafting requirements */,
  "usage_requirements" TEXT /* JSON field to store usage requirements (e.g., level, class) */,
  "effects" TEXT /* JSON field to store item effects */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_subclass FOREIGN KEY ("subclass") REFERENCES item_subcategories ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_level FOREIGN KEY ("level") REFERENCES item_levels ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_class FOREIGN KEY ("class") REFERENCES item_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "buy_price" INTEGER /* Buy price of the item */,
  "sell_price" INTEGER /* Sell price of the item */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the vendor in the game world */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the vendor is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the vendor's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Market value of the item */,
  "min_buyout" INTEGER /* Minimum buyout price of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item available */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the market data */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "is_auctionable" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the item can be auctioned */,
  "average_daily_sales" REAL /* Average number of items sold per day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_markets_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_markets_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auctions" (
  "auction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each auction entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "num_auctions" INTEGER /* Number of auctions for the item */,
  "historical_price" REAL /* Historical price of the item */,
  "bid_price" REAL /* Current highest bid price */,
  "num_bids" INTEGER /* Number of bids placed on the item */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the auction */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the auction end time */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the auction has completed */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning bidder (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("auction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auctions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "market_avg" REAL /* Market average price of the item in the region */,
  "min_buyout_avg" INTEGER /* Minimum buyout average price of the item in the region */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item available in the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Number of players in the region */,
  "activity_level" TEXT /* Activity level of the region (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the region data */,
  "top_items" TEXT /* JSON field to store the top items in the region by sales or popularity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_item_data" (
  "region_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region-item entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "historical_price" REAL /* Historical price of the item in the region */,
  "sale_avg" REAL /* Average sale price of the item in the region */,
  "avg_daily_sold" REAL /* Average number of items sold per day in the region */,
  "sale_rate" REAL /* Sale rate of the item in the region */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the item in the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the region item data */,
  "trend_score" REAL /* Trend score of the item in the region */,
  "is_promoted" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the item is promoted in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_item_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_item_data_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., player, developer, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of user registration */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive, banned) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON field to store user permissions */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's team */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the transaction */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell, auction) */,
  "is_refundable" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the transaction is refundable */,
  "refund_date" TEXT /* Date of the refund (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_transactions_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_transactions_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_transactions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendor_item_data" (
  "vendor_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor-item entry */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "buy_price" INTEGER /* Buy price of the item at the vendor */,
  "sell_price" INTEGER /* Sell price of the item at the vendor */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the vendor item data */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Availability status of the item at the vendor (e.g., in stock, out of stock) */,
  "is_popular" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the item is popular at the vendor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vendor_item_data_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vendor_item_data_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the category's icon */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the category is a default category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the subcategory's icon */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the subcategory is a default subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the level */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the level's icon */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the level is a default level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_vendor_pricing" (
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor */,
  "buy_price" INTEGER /* Buy price of the item at the vendor */,
  "sell_price" INTEGER /* Sell price of the item at the vendor */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the vendor pricing data */,
  "discount_rate" REAL /* Discount rate for the item at the vendor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_vendor_pricing_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_vendor_pricing_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Market value of the item */,
  "min_buyout" INTEGER /* Minimum buyout price of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item available */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the market data */,
  "is_auctionable" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the item can be auctioned */,
  "average_daily_sales" REAL /* Average number of items sold per day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_auction_data" (
  "auction_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each auction data entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "num_auctions" INTEGER /* Number of auctions for the item */,
  "historical_price" REAL /* Historical price of the item */,
  "bid_price" REAL /* Current highest bid price */,
  "num_bids" INTEGER /* Number of bids placed on the item */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the auction */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the auction end time */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the auction has completed */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning bidder (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("auction_data_id")
)
